code-runner.executorMap.c: gcc C:\snake\$fileName -o C:\snake\$fileNameWithoutExt.exe && start powershell -NoExit -Command "chcp 65001 > $null; cd C:\snake\output; .\$fileNameWithoutExt.exe"
code-runner.executorMap.cpp: g++ C:\snake\$fileName -o C:\snake\$fileNameWithoutExt.exe && start powershell -NoExit -Command "chcp 65001 > $null; C:\snake\$fileNameWithoutExt.exe"
